narrative: Stocks finished the week roughly flat as a late-week rebound in AI-linked megacaps (notably Nvidia) helped erase earlier losses and lift the Nasdaq on Friday while small caps lagged. Investors weighed choppy risk sentiment around the crowded AI trade alongside a light-but-important macro backdrop that kept rates expectations in focus heading into year-end.

value_picks.name: UMB Financial
value_picks.why_undervalued: Trading at 49% discount to fair value based on cash flows amid market volatility.
value_picks.bull_case: Strong regional bank with positive FCF and conservative balance sheet positioned for recovery as rates stabilize.

value_picks.name: Columbia Banking System
value_picks.why_undervalued: Estimated 49.3% below intrinsic value per cash flow analysis in late December 2025.
value_picks.bull_case: Solid banking franchise with durable earnings power trading at low multiples post-cyclical trough.

value_picks.name: Mobileye Global
value_picks.why_undervalued: 48% discount to fair value despite leadership in autonomous driving tech.
value_picks.bull_case: Key AV player with strong IP moat; patent overhang resolving as partnerships expand.

value_picks.name: Krystal Biotech
value_picks.why_undervalued: Trading 47.9% below cash flow-based fair value amid biotech sector pressures.
value_picks.bull_case: Gene therapy leader with approved products and pipeline; undervalued growth ahead.

value_picks.name: Motorcar Parts of America
value_picks.why_undervalued: 48.1% discount to fair value for auto parts supplier near 52w lows.
value_picks.bull_case: Cyclical industrial recovering from trough with positive FCF and low valuation.

momentum_picks.name: Carnival Corporation
momentum_picks.catalyst: Strong cruise demand post-pandemic and positive holiday booking trends driving weekly gains.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: High beta play with leverage but improving balance sheet offers asymmetric upside.

momentum_picks.name: Moderna
momentum_picks.catalyst: Positive pipeline updates and mRNA platform momentum amid health sector rotation.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Volatile biotech with combo vaccine potential outweighs near-term pipeline risks.

momentum_picks.name: Micron Technology
momentum_picks.catalyst: Optimistic AI memory demand forecasts sparking tech rebound on Dec 19.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Semiconductor leader in HBM for AI; cyclical but strong pricing power.

momentum_picks.name: Oracle Corporation
momentum_picks.catalyst: TikTok US JV announcement boosting cloud/AI enterprise software outlook.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Stable software giant with AI tailwinds provides favorable risk/reward.

momentum_picks.name: Norwegian Cruise Line
momentum_picks.catalyst: Travel sector strength and sector rotation into cyclicals during market volatility.
momentum_picks.risk_reward: Leveraged to leisure recovery with limited downside from current levels.

watchlist_updates.detail: Beat estimates but kept FY guidance unchanged implying H2 weakness; largest S&P 500 decliner.
Profits beat but China sales down 17%, weak outlook overshadowed results.
Beat estimates with record 2026/2027 bookings; top S&P gainer.
TikTok US ops to JV including Oracle and Silver Lake.
Strong AI memory demand drove optimistic outlook after prior day's gains.
Rode CCL momentum in cruise sector.
Homes delivered fell, ASP down 7% YoY.
Beat but FY upgrade smaller than expected due to costs.
Reported during week amid tech rebound.
Energy sector down >4% wk on crude lows.
